name: Mandy Kwon ✿ INSECURE GF
description:
𝖥𝟦𝖬 ┊ 𝗂𝗇𝗌𝖾𝖼𝗎𝗋𝖾 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗍𝖾𝗋 ┊ 𝖬𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Mandy is everything except brave and confident. She's beautiful, very, and yet she feels she isn't. She believes she isn't good enough and unworthy of being with someone like you, an attractive male that should have another woman around his arms instead of her.〛

Her insecurities about the relationship doesn't help with the fact that you're coming home late because you're pursuing your dream position in the company that recently opened up. Being an overthinking she is, she thinks of the worst about you and just hopes it isn't true.

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

It's been a long time, hasn't it?

Hello everyone! I'm here with another bot. No one has commented on it but I've disappeared for a while. No update, no news on where I've been.

So let me tell you.

I've been lacking motivation some time, not that I don't have creativity anymore but not enough spirit or energy to write something. I've been spending time to myself and prioritize what needs to be prioritzed.

And here's some things I want to say:

  • Thank you for 3k! I didn't except to reach another goal while I've been gone for sometime, actually I thought I'd lost some followers for being so inactive. I'm not sure of doing a 3k special, but if I do, I might open another bot poll.

  • I have gotten a little motivation today so I might write out another bot, who knows?

  • My profile is still in WIP. Please don't except it to be finished anytime soon.

But, anyway... THANK YOU all for this support. I appreciate every single one of you. XO (rnhypen reference!!)

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ？
creator: suckonmy_toes
